creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
> To be frank, this will not work in our pkg builder at all, as it tries to download files at post-fetch targets, which are not allowed.

I don't think that's true... did you try building this patch?

I build it using poudriere test-port which to my understanding follows all the same rules as the package builder.

It pre-fetches all the dependencies as defined in GH_TUPLE and then uses a combination of GOMODCACHE + `mod vendor` in `pre-build` to use the downloaded ones.

I just did this test:

    poudriere testport -i devel/please
    $ su
    # make clean
    # make distclean
    # make fetch
    (disable networking on host)
    $ make
    $ make install

Where specifically are you seeing it try to download files at post-fetch targets? Because that's not what I observe.
